hero.title: Iconic
hero.subtitle: Business Address
hero.description: The address that defines Kuwait's most distinguished institutions, sovereign tenants, and global luxury brands.
hero.sideLabel: Sharq District · Kuwait City · 413m · SOM Architecture
hero.alt: Al Hamra Business Tower rising 412.6 meters above Kuwait City
hero.bodyPrimaryPara1: The Al Hamra Tower's geometry was generated by a single decisive act: subtracting a spiraling quadrant from a simple prismatic volume, then rotating it incrementally at each higher level. The result is two hyperbolic paraboloid walls — the iconic flared ribbons — that extend the full 412.6 meters of the building's height.
hero.bodyPrimaryPara2Html: The transparent glass envelope faces north, west, and east — toward the Arabian Gulf. The monolithic stone wall faces south — shielding every office from Kuwait's desert sun. Architecture and engineering evolved together. The structure is the form.
hero.pullquote: Like an enshrouded figure with its delicate glass veil, the Tower provides spectacular views over much of Kuwait and across the Arabian Gulf.
hero.headlineSecondary: Glass toward the Gulf. Stone toward the desert.

founderQuote.quote: The building geometry is generated by a spiralling slice subtracted from a simple prismatic volume — architectural expression through structural form on a grand scale.
founderQuote.caption: 412.6 m · Kuwait City

invitation.title: An address you're invited to inhabit.
invitation.body: Al Hamra Business Tower does not advertise availability. Tenancy is by invitation — a quiet conversation between the building and the institution worthy of it.

government.label: Government & Sovereign
government.desc: Kuwait's leading ministries, sovereign wealth funds and GCC institutions

retail.label: Luxury Retail
retail.desc: Hermès · Gucci · Bottega Veneta · YSL · Ferragamo · Mont Blanc · Panerai

financial.label: Financial & Professional
financial.desc: Regional and international financial institutions and professional services firms

globalRecognition.title: Engineered to be seen — engineered to be remembered.
globalRecognition.body: Cityscape Award 2010 · Chicago Athenaeum · MIPIM Architectural Review · Miami Architectural Biennial 2007. The world's largest stone-clad skyscraper — 258,000m² of Jura limestone — engineered by SOM San Francisco.

unmatchedAddress.title: The Capital's Hub
unmatchedAddress.body: Sharq District — Kuwait's financial and government quarter. Direct access to the National Bank of Kuwait, major ministries, and the waterfront. 2,000 parking spaces across 11 levels. Fibre optic smart building. 100% power redundancy.

floorConfigs.title: Space that adapts to the institution inside.

c1.label: Configuration 01
c1.title: Ministerial Suite
c1.body: Corner office configuration with panoramic city views and private meeting room. Ideal for regional offices and professional firms.

c2.label: Configuration 02
c2.title: Sovereign Floor
c2.body: Entire floor exclusivity with private elevator access and dedicated reception. 3.2m ceiling height with 360° views.

c3.label: Configuration 03
c3.title: Flagship Headquarters
c3.body: Multiple floors with building signage rights and dedicated parking levels. Kuwait's premier headquarters address.

contactStrip.title: The next step is a conversation.

experience.title: The architecture, the business, the address — one landmark.
experience.subtitle: Four threads that meet at the summit of Sharq District. Choose where to begin.

tower.title: 412.6 meters of architectural ambition
tower.desc: Kuwait's tallest building — designed by SOM, clad in Jura limestone, and engineered as a single sculptural gesture.

architecture.title: Glass toward the Gulf. Stone toward the desert.
architecture.desc: Two hyperbolic paraboloid walls, a 24m column-free lobby, and 258,000m² of Jura limestone cladding.

business.title: An address for the region's principals
business.desc: Ministries, sovereign funds, leading legal and financial institutions, and global luxury brands — tenants by invitation.

leasing.title: Configurations tailored to your mandate
leasing.desc: From half-floor 450m² suites to full-floor 2,300m² mandates. Executive suites on floors 74 and 75. Kuwait's premier address.
